title: xyris goyazensis
intro: Xyris goyazensis, also known as the Goyaz iris, is a species of plant in the family Xyridaceae, native to Brazil. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xyris goyazensis include its potential to help with wound healing, reducing inflammation, and fighting against certain diseases. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves, stems, and roots are used in various traditional remedies.
